Projects

Real BI, OLAP and Data Science projects.

Professional case studies with objective, methodology, tools, results and decision-making value.

AdventureWorks Incremental Data Warehouse

A Business Intelligence project using SSIS and AdventureWorks to build an incremental ETL pipeline, staging area, star schema and purchasing KPIs.

SSISSQL ServerData WarehouseETLKPIs
Open project

SSAS OLAP Cube Analysis

A Business Intelligence project using SSAS and MDX to analyze marketing performance through OLAP operations such as slice, dice, drill-down, roll-up and pivot.

SSASOLAPMDXData WarehouseMarketing Analytics
Open project

Agricultural Climate Prediction

A data science project using NASA POWER climate data, EDA and machine learning to predict tomorrow’s maximum temperature and optimize agricultural planning in Radès.

PythonMachine LearningEDANASA POWERClimate
Open project
